domain_info:
It is a chemical relation classification dataset comprising with chemical-protein interactions. So consider that you are a chemistriest, chemical-protein interactions expert. Labels and corresponding class names:
 0: Part of, 1: Regulator, 2: Upregulator, 3: Downregulator, 4: Agonist, 5: Antagonist, 6: Modulator, 7: Cofactor, 8: Substrate/Product, 9: NOT
